title: Trading Shutdown Control
subtitle: Safely close all open positions before restarting the server

tradingState.enabledDesc: New position entries are allowed. System is operating normally.
tradingState.reasonSession: Active because the session is in its final 30-minute window (session-end protection).
tradingState.reasonManual: Active due to a manual close-all or shutdown operation.
tradingState.checkResumeTip: Click to verify conditions and resume normal trading

actions.closeAllDesc: Immediately close every open position and enter exit-only mode
actions.scheduleDesc: Close all positions at a future time — useful before a planned restart

dialog.noPositions: No open positions currently — operation will still run
dialog.warnExitOnly: New entries will be blocked immediately
dialog.warnExitOnlyScheduled: New entries will be blocked at execution time
dialog.warnMarket: Positions may be closed at market price

completedBanner.title: All Positions Closed
completedBanner.body: {{count}} position(s) closed. It is now safe to shut down or restart the server.

resume.title: Resume Normal Trading
resume.desc: Re-enable new position entries. Exit-only mode will be lifted.
resume.dialogBody: This will re-enable new entry orders. Make sure the system is healthy before resuming.
resume.success: Trading has been resumed. New entries are now allowed.
